modules.text: Stay on track with each phase of the hackathon — from registration to final presentations. Know when to submit, what to expect, and how to prepare at every stage. Follow the guidelines to make the most of your Seqathon 2025 journey!

modules.title: Phase 1: Step In
modules.text: Ready to jump in? Register for our Seqathon 2025 and let us know who's ready to take on the challenge.⚠️ But here’s the twist: the real action begins after registration. On August 15, we’ll receive participant details and your journey begins.

modules.title: Phase 2: The Warmup Battle
modules.text:
🧩 Mission #1:

Crack the problem.On August 20, you’ll get your problem statements via email. Dive in, build your solution, and submit it via GitHub by August 21.Stuck? Reach out. We’re here to help you break through blockers and keep going..

modules.title: Phase 3: Earn Your Spot
modules.text: Our team will review your submissions and shortlist the top 10 teams by August 25. If you make it, we’ll email you to submit your payment details to confirm your spot.🎟️ Once confirmed, get ready for the big stage.

modules.title: Phase 4: The Final Challenge
modules.text: 🔥 You’re in! On September 18 (Morning), we’ll send you a new set of problem statements. Choose your mission and confirm your selection by replying to the email.You’ll have the day to build and submit your final solution via GitHub by September 18 (Evening).

modules.title: Phase 5: Showdown Day
modules.text: ⚡️ September 20: All 10 teams gather at our office for the final presentation day. Showcase your solution, your approach, and your creativity in front of our panel.Expect energy, learning, fun, and connections that go beyond the hackathon.
